items.message: [grounding-injection] External grounding injection: run `python3 tools/external_grounding_check.py --decay --top 10` — ground top-priority lessons with genuine external citations (named theories, papers, benchmarks). Target: 5-10 lessons per pass. Track overall grounding rate (baseline 15% at S481). L-601: without periodic prompting, voluntary grounding decays to 0%. F-GND1. (every ~10 sessions, last: S501)
Count drift in INDEX.md (L: stated 1236 vs actual 1237) — run python3 tools/sync_state.py
